did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper is a Data Descriptor introducing the MCR-SL dataset. It does not use AI to obtain study results; rather, it presents a curated dataset intended for the development and validation of future AI models. The only AI tool mentioned is Gemini 2.5 Flash, which was used to polish the text of the manuscript, not to generate dermatological results.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
